landing.title: Fabble
landing.description: Daily Flesh and Blood card deduction puzzle

mode.standard_description: A curated selection of popular cards from the current meta
mode.chaos_description: Every printed card, including banned ones

rules.title: How to Play Fabble
rules.what_is_body: A new Flesh and Blood card is chosen each day. Use your FAB knowledge to figure out which one it is. Every guess shows how your card compares to the answer across eleven attributes.
rules.how_to_guess_body: Start typing a card name and pick one from the dropdown. The attribute tiles flip to show how close you are.

edge_case.rainbow_pitch: Guessing a rainbow-suite card automatically matches any pitch value the answer has, since rainbow cards are printed in all three pitch values.
edge_case.reprints: A card matches on Set if any printing of your guessed card shares a set with the answer.
edge_case.generic: Generic is its own class and will never give a partial match against a class-locked card.
edge_case.directional: On numeric columns (Power, Defense, Cost, Life/INT) and Set, the arrow tells you whether the answer is higher or lower than your guess.
edge_case.pitch_rainbow: A green Pitch tile showing "All colors" means the answer is a rainbow-suite card, printed in all three pitch values.
edge_case.set_all_printings: The Set column shows every set your guessed card has been printed in, newest to oldest. Each entry has an arrow showing whether the answer's first printing came out newer or older.

feedback_state.yellow: Partial match. At least one value overlaps, like a shared class or keyword.
feedback_state.red: No match. An arrow tells you whether the answer is higher or lower. A ban icon means the answer card has no such stat at all. Look for a card that also lacks it.

column_description.type: The card's type (Action, Equipment, Hero, etc.)
column_description.class: The class of the card (Warrior, Ninja, etc.)
column_description.talent: Talent of the card (Draconic, Light, Shadow, etc.)
column_description.pitch: Pitch value: red (1), yellow (2), blue (3), or no pitch
column_description.cost: Resource cost to play the card
column_description.keywords: Keywords on the card (Go again, Dominate, Temper, etc.)
column_description.keyword: Keywords on the card (Go again, Dominate, Temper, etc.)
column_description.set: Which sets the card has been printed in, newest to oldest, with a direction arrow per entry to point you in the right direction

error.unknown_card: Card not found in this mode's pool.

tooltip.na: This stat does not apply to the comparison.
tooltip.na_cross_type: This attribute does not apply when comparing these card types.
tooltip.pitch_match_no_pitch: Neither this card nor the answer has a pitch value.
tooltip.pitch_rainbow: The answer exists in all pitch colors (rainbow-suite card).

aria.na: {{column}}: not applicable for this card type
aria.na_cross_type: {{column}}: does not apply when comparing these card types
aria.pitch_match_no_pitch: Pitch: no pitch value, matches the answer
aria.pitch_rainbow: Pitch: the answer exists in all pitch colors

already_solved.title: Already solved today
